Here is some information about the plant "Dracontium muricatum" (Snake Palm Dracontium) which might be what you were referring to:

The Snake Palm Dracontium (Dracontium muricatum) is a plant species in the Arum family, Araceae. 

The health benefits of the Snake Palm Dracontium plant include its potential use in treating various health conditions, including menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other female reproductive health issues.

The bioactive constituents of the Snake Palm Dracontium plant include diosgenin, a steroid saponin that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with the Snake Palm Dracontium plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support female reproductive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
